name: Game On!
overview: Two teams of three with a rotating roster of stars compete in over-the-top physical challenges, absurd trivia and epic field competitions. Each week, one team will be crowned the winner, while the losing team must “take the L” in an embarrassing punishment.

trailers.title: Game On! - Behind the scenes sneak peek
Backstage at GAME ON w/ Keegan-Michael Key, Gronk, James Corden & Ian Karmel
